---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem or the idea. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually enter hex codes..." OR "It would be awesome if Dithra had a [Specific Retro Console] palette!"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Ex. "Add a feature to import .gpl palette files," or "Add a WebP export option."

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered (e.g., using another app alongside Dithra, manual workarounds, etc.).

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or links to specific dithering algorithms/color palettes here.
